---
title: "Leaf Angle and Water Availability"
description: "Analyzing leaf angle and  water potential in drought-stressed conditions from two oak species"
date: 05-02-2026
categories: [RStudio, Data Visualization, Lab Work, Research Project]
image: tree-image.jpg
draft: false
---

---

I began working on this research project since the start of the Fall 2025 quarter with the guidance of my PhD student mentor in the LEAF Lab.  Most of that time was spent measuring leaves one-by-one from photographs that the lab collected from Sedgwick Reserve.  However, coding the data was more difficult at times since I was just learning how to use R-programming consistently.   

------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](leaf-poster.pdf){width="100%" height="1000px"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------
